ab: ngaran ni ama am siaman Manineng.
ngaran ni ina am sinan Manineng.
ya asa ngarnan o kakawakawan ko siciawan ya.
ya asa o kaka ko a mehakay, ngaran na am si Manineng, ya asa so ikaroa na ngarnan no kakawakawan na.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Manineng，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Manineng, he is 11 years old.

ab: ya namen miyangay so pivatvatekan a gako.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: yaken a ka ni kaka mehakay am, namen teymakey a mianoanood.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: ko makey a miawawat, no ya miwalam am, namen mangay miawawat a asa ka vahay.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: ko makey a maciboang do vayo a kagagan, ta apia a kapieza namen a mangay mianoanood a ka no miawawat.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
